apple.name: Apple
benefits: Rich in antioxidants that may reduce risk of chronic diseases
High fiber content aids digestion and promotes gut health
Contains quercetin which may boost brain health
Low calorie density helps with weight management
apple.storage_tips: Store in cool, dry place. Refrigerate to extend freshness. Keep away from other fruits to prevent ripening.

banana.name: Banana
benefits: Excellent source of potassium for heart health
High in vitamin B6 for brain function
Natural energy booster with easily digestible sugars
Contains prebiotics that support gut bacteria
banana.storage_tips: Store at room temperature. Refrigerate when ripe to slow further ripening. Brown spots indicate ripeness.

orange.name: Orange
benefits: Extremely high in Vitamin C, boosting immune system
Rich in antioxidants that fight inflammation
May reduce risk of kidney stones
orange.storage_tips: Store at room temperature or refrigerate. Keep in mesh bag for air circulation. Avoid storing with other fruits.

tomato.name: Tomato
benefits: Rich in lycopene, a powerful antioxidant
May reduce risk of certain cancers
Supports heart health and lowers cholesterol
High in Vitamin C for immune support
tomato.storage_tips: Store at room temperature until ripe, then refrigerate. Keep stem-side down. Avoid direct sunlight.

carrot.name: Carrot
benefits: Extremely high in beta-carotene for eye health
May reduce risk of certain cancers
carrot.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper drawer. Remove green tops before storing. Keep in perforated plastic bag.

potato.name: Potato
benefits: Excellent source of potassium for heart health
High in resistant starch when cooked and cooled
Provides sustained energy from complex carbs
May help control blood sugar when prepared properly
potato.storage_tips: Store in cool, dark, well-ventilated place. Do not refrigerate raw potatoes. Keep away from onions.

onion.name: Onion
benefits: Rich in quercetin, a powerful antioxidant
May reduce risk of certain cancers
Supports heart health and blood sugar control
onion.storage_tips: Store in cool, dry, well-ventilated place. Keep away from potatoes. Do not store in plastic bags.

cucumber.name: Cucumber
benefits: Very low in calories, great for weight loss
High water content keeps you hydrated
May help lower blood sugar levels
Promotes healthy skin and reduces inflammation
cucumber.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep dry and wrapped in paper towel. Use within a week for best quality.

bell_pepper.name: Bell Pepper
benefits: Extremely high in Vitamin C (more than oranges)
Rich in antioxidants for eye health
May reduce risk of chronic diseases
Low in calories, high in nutrients
bell_pepper.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Do not wash until ready to use.

broccoli.name: Broccoli
benefits: High in sulforaphane, a powerful anti-cancer compound
Supports bone health with Vitamin K
broccoli.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Do not wash until ready to use. Best when fresh.

spinach.name: Spinach
benefits: Extremely high in iron for blood health
Rich in Vitamin K for bone strength
High in antioxidants for eye health
May reduce risk of chronic diseases
spinach.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in airtight container with paper towel. Use quickly as it wilts fast.

mango.name: Mango
benefits: King of fruits with rich flavor and nutrients
High in Vitamin A for eye and skin health
mango.storage_tips: Store at room temperature until ripe, then refrigerate. Keep away from other fruits. Ripen in paper bag.

grapes.name: Grapes
benefits: Rich in resveratrol, a powerful antioxidant
May support heart health and reduce inflammation
Contains compounds that may protect against cancer
grapes.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator in original packaging. Do not wash until ready to eat. Keep in crisper drawer.

strawberry.name: Strawberry
benefits: Rich in antioxidants like ellagic acid
strawberry.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator, do not wash until ready to eat. Keep in original container. Use quickly as they spoil fast.

watermelon.name: Watermelon
benefits: Extremely high water content for hydration
Rich in lycopene for heart health
Contains citrulline that may improve exercise performance
Low in calories, refreshing summer fruit
watermelon.storage_tips: Store whole at room temperature. Once cut, refrigerate wrapped. Best consumed fresh. Keep cut pieces covered.

papaya.name: Papaya
benefits: Rich in papain enzyme that aids digestion
High in Vitamin C and antioxidants
Supports skin health and wound healing
Good source of fiber for digestive health
papaya.storage_tips: Store at room temperature until ripe, then refrigerate. Ripen in paper bag. Eat when slightly soft.

pomegranate.name: Pomegranate
benefits: May reduce inflammation and lower blood pressure
Rich in punicic acid for heart health
May improve memory and brain function
pomegranate.storage_tips: Store whole in refrigerator. Once opened, seeds can be refrigerated for 5 days. Keep in airtight container.

cabbage.name: Cabbage
benefits: Very low in calories, great for weight loss
High in Vitamin K for bone health
Contains compounds that may reduce inflammation
cabbage.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep outer leaves intact until use. Wrap in plastic to retain moisture.

cauliflower.name: Cauliflower
benefits: Low in calories, high in nutrients
Rich in choline for brain health
May reduce risk of certain diseases
cauliflower.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Do not wash until ready to use. Best when fresh.

eggplant.name: Eggplant
benefits: High in fiber for digestive health
eggplant.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Use quickly as it can become bitter with age.

okra.name: Okra
benefits: High in soluble fiber for blood sugar control
Good source of Vitamin K for bone health
okra.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep dry in paper bag. Use quickly as it becomes slimy with age.

coconut.name: Coconut
benefits: Rich in manganese for bone health
Contains lauric acid with antimicrobial properties
coconut.storage_tips: Store whole coconut at room temperature. Once opened, refrigerate coconut water and meat separately.

guava.name: Guava
benefits: Extremely high in Vitamin C (4x more than oranges)
May help lower blood sugar levels
Supports immune system and skin health
guava.storage_tips: Store at room temperature until ripe, then refrigerate. Ripen in paper bag. Eat when slightly soft.

lemon.name: Lemon
benefits: Contains citric acid that may prevent kidney stones
lemon.storage_tips: Store at room temperature or refrigerate. Keep in mesh bag. Can be stored for weeks when fresh.

ginger.name: Ginger
benefits: May reduce nausea and morning sickness
May help reduce muscle pain and soreness
ginger.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator in airtight container. Can be frozen for longer storage. Keep dry.

garlic.name: Garlic
benefits: Contains allicin with powerful medicinal properties
May reduce blood pressure and cholesterol
May reduce risk of certain cancers
garlic.storage_tips: Store in cool, dry, well-ventilated place. Keep bulbs intact until use. Do not refrigerate whole bulbs.

coriander.name: Coriander
benefits: Contains compounds that may reduce inflammation
High in Vitamin K for bone health
coriander.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator with stems in water. Keep in airtight container. Use quickly as it wilts fast.

mint.name: Mint
benefits: May improve digestion and reduce IBS symptoms
mint.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator with stems in water. Keep in airtight container. Can be frozen for longer storage.

radish.name: Radish
benefits: Contains compounds that may reduce inflammation
radish.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Remove green tops before storing. Keep in perforated bag. Best when fresh.

beetroot.name: Beetroot
benefits: May improve athletic performance and endurance
Rich in nitrates that may lower blood pressure
High in folate for cell growth
Supports brain health and cognitive function
beetroot.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Remove green tops before storing. Keep in perforated bag. Can be stored for weeks.

sweet_potato.name: Sweet Potato
benefits: Extremely high in beta-carotene for eye health
sweet_potato.storage_tips: Store in cool, dark, well-ventilated place. Do not refrigerate raw. Keep away from moisture.

corn.name: Corn
benefits: Good source of fiber for digestive health
Rich in antioxidants like lutein and zeaxanthin
Contains B vitamins for energy metabolism
corn.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator with husks on. Use quickly as sugar converts to starch. Best when very fresh.

peas.name: Peas
benefits: High in protein for a vegetable
Rich in fiber for digestive health
peas.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator in original packaging. Use quickly as they lose sweetness. Can be frozen for longer storage.

brinjal.name: Brinjal
benefits: High in fiber for digestive health
brinjal.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Use quickly as it can become bitter with age.

ladyfinger.name: Ladyfinger
benefits: High in soluble fiber for blood sugar control
Good source of Vitamin K for bone health
ladyfinger.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep dry in paper bag. Use quickly as it becomes slimy with age.

drumstick.name: Drumstick
benefits: High in Vitamin C and antioxidants
Rich in calcium for bone health
drumstick.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Use quickly as it becomes tough with age.

bottle_gourd.name: Bottle Gourd
benefits: Very low in calories, great for weight loss
bottle_gourd.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Use quickly as it becomes soft with age.

ridge_gourd.name: Ridge Gourd
ridge_gourd.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Use quickly as it becomes soft with age.

bitter_gourd.name: Bitter Gourd
benefits: May help lower blood sugar levels
High in fiber for digestive health
bitter_gourd.storage_tips: Store in refrigerator crisper. Keep in perforated bag. Use quickly as it becomes more bitter with age.
